to: Jeffrey E. Epstein, Jeffrey Epstein, Jeffrey Epstein, Jeffrey epstein foundation
subject: Private and Confidential
body:
Hello Jeffrey,

In light of what has occurred and my work as an advocate of trafficked
victims, I would like to learn more directly from you, your side of the
story.

Please could we talk this week?

Thank you.

Sincerely,
Conchita Sarnoff
body_html:
Hello Jeffrey,

In light of what has occurred and my work as an advocate of trafficked victims, I would like to learn more directly from you, your side of the story.

Thank you.
